curation_notes: Primary location derived from the patch diff: the convert_to_value method in string.rb used eval(self) on array-like input strings. The patch replaces eval() with YAML.safe_load(). The Python sibling (extract.py) already used the safe ast.literal_eval() and was not vulnerable. No sibling files in the core_ext directory share the eval() pattern. Kept pre-assigned class command-injection (CWE-95 eval injection maps to command-injection as the closest available class).
